headline: Electric air taxis go to war
summary: Archer Aviation partnered with defense tech company Anduril on a new aircraft. The platform is designed for both military and commercial applications. This moves electric aviation beyond air taxis into defense.

headline: Avengers: Doomsday’s first trailer puts everyone on high alert
summary: Marvel released the first full trailer for "Avengers: Doomsday." Robert Downey Jr.'s Doctor Doom appears to be causing significant chaos. The film promises a massive and diverse cast.

headline: AliExpress fined almost $630 million over illegal product sales
summary: AliExpress was fined €550 million ($629 million) by the European Commission. The penalty is for violating Europe's Digital Services Act (DSA). They failed to prevent illegal or counterfeit product sales on their platform.

headline: China delivers a one-two punch to America’s AI dominance
summary: Chinese AI companies Moonshot and Alibaba unveiled new AI models. These models aim to compete with OpenAI and Anthropic at a lower cost. China's rapid advancements are challenging America's AI leadership.

headline: Batman by Scott Snyder & Greg Capullo Omnibus Vol. 1 Is 50% Off at Amazon Today
summary: Amazon is offering a 50% discount on "Batman by Scott Snyder & Greg Capullo Omnibus Vol. 1." This is part of a broader sale on popular Batman comics. Fans can grab essential stories at a significant markdown.

headline: Is Robert Downey Jr's Doctor Doom the Hero or Villain of Avengers: Doomsday?
summary: The first "Avengers: Doomsday" trailer features Robert Downey Jr.'s Doctor Doom. Speculation arises whether Doom will be a hero or villain in the film. Fans are debating his true intentions based on the new footage.

headline: Oni Press and The Nacelle Company Join Forces for The Art of The Toys That Made Us
summary: Oni Press and The Nacelle Company are collaborating on a new art book. "The Art of The Toys That Made Us" previews before Season 4 of the Netflix show. It features exclusive content, including Biker Mice From Mars figures.

headline: First Proper Avengers: Doomsday Trailer Reveals Thor, Steve Rogers, and Doctor Doom Himself
summary: Marvel Studios released the first full trailer for "Avengers: Doomsday." The trailer showcases Thor, Steve Rogers, and Doctor Doom. Tickets for the highly anticipated film are now on sale.

headline: Burnham promises help with your money. How could it affect you?
summary: New Prime Minister Andy Burnham pledges to make life more affordable for citizens. His proposals aim to address cost-of-living concerns and boost financial well-being. The article examines the potential impact of his economic policies.

headline: Watch: Starmer resigns, Burnham becomes PM... the day so far
summary: Andy Burnham has been appointed as the new Prime Minister of the UK. His appointment followed the resignation of the previous leader, Starmer. Burnham was officially instated by the King at Buckingham Palace.

headline: Burnham makes pledge to end rough sleeping in first speech as prime minister
summary: Prime Minister Andy Burnham vowed to end rough sleeping in his inaugural speech. He made a similar pledge during his tenure as Greater Manchester mayor. However, his previous attempt to achieve this goal was unsuccessful.

headline: Who is Andy Burnham's wife, Marie-France van Heel?
summary: Marie-France van Heel, known as Frankie, is the wife of Prime Minister Andy Burnham. She works as a marketing executive. The couple has been in a relationship since their university days.
